title: Flame of My Love
writer: Kôgo Noda, Kaneto Shindô, Yoshikata Yoda
actors: Kinuyo Tanaka, Mitsuko Mito, Kuniko Miyake
plot: A woman's struggle for equality in Japan in the 1880s. Eiko Hirayama leaves Okayama for Tokyo, where she helps the fledgling Liberal Party and falls in love with its leader Kentaro Omoi, just as the party is being disbanded by the...
